# tsuga_custom_usage_tag (Resource)

User-defined tag to add to usage telemetry


## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tsuga_custom_usage_tag" "custom_usage_tag" {
  tag_key = "cost-center"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `tag_key` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
